ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country emitting */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emission */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Value of the emission */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used to measure the emission */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector responsible for the emission */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission source */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "decade" TEXT /* Decade to which the year belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the researcher is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the emission record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the emission record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessor */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the accessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record to which the metadata belongs */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable being described */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used to measure the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
